inputs.label: Oiliness Level
inputs.businessContext: Skin oiliness scale: 0 (very dry) to 4 (very oily).

businessContext_i18n.en: Skin oiliness scale: 0 (very dry) to 4 (very oily).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cilt yağlılık ölçeği: 0 (çok kuru) ile 4 (çok yağlı) arası.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Échelle de sébum cutané : 0 (très sec) à 4 (très gras).
businessContext_i18n.es: Escala de grasa de la piel: 0 (muy seca) a 4 (muy grasa).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس دهنية البشرة: 0 (جافة جدًا) إلى 4 (دهنية جدًا).

inputs.label: Hydration Level
inputs.businessContext: Skin hydration scale: 0 (very dehydrated) to 4 (very hydrated).

businessContext_i18n.en: Skin hydration scale: 0 (very dehydrated) to 4 (very hydrated).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cilt nem ölçeği: 0 (çok kuru) ile 4 (çok nemli) arası.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Échelle d'hydratation cutanée : 0 (très déshydraté) à 4 (très hydraté).
businessContext_i18n.es: Escala de hidratación de la piel: 0 (muy deshidratada) a 4 (muy hidratada).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس ترطيب البشرة: 0 (مجففة جدًا) إلى 4 (مرطبة جدًا).

inputs.label: Sensitivity Level
inputs.businessContext: Skin sensitivity scale: 0 (not sensitive) to 4 (very sensitive).

businessContext_i18n.en: Skin sensitivity scale: 0 (not sensitive) to 4 (very sensitive).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cilt hassasiyet ölçeği: 0 (hassas değil) ile 4 (çok hassas) arası.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Échelle de sensibilité cutanée : 0 (non sensible) à 4 (très sensible).
businessContext_i18n.es: Escala de sensibilidad de la piel: 0 (no sensible) a 4 (muy sensible).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس حساسية البشرة: 0 (غير حساسة) إلى 4 (شديدة الحساسية).

inputs.label: Pigmentation Level
inputs.businessContext: Pigmentation concerns scale: 0 (no issues) to 4 (major pigmentation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Pigmentation concerns scale: 0 (no issues) to 4 (major pigmentation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pigmentasyon sorunları ölçeği: 0 (sorun yok) ile 4 (ciddi pigmentasyon) arası.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Échelle des problèmes de pigmentation : 0 (aucun) à 4 (pigmentation majeure).
businessContext_i18n.es: Escala de preocupaciones por pigmentación: 0 (sin problemas) a 4 (pigmentación importante).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس مشاكل التصبغ: 0 (لا توجد مشاكل) إلى 4 (تصبغ كبير).

businessContext_i18n.es: Escala de elasticidad de la piel: 0 (pobre) a 4 (excelente).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
